name: last30days-openclaw
description: OpenClaw adaptation of @mvanhorn's last30days research skill. Researches last-30-day signals across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, and web; includes watchlists, briefings, and historical query workflows.
author: Original: @mvanhorn | OpenClaw adaptation: Tommy

setup.postInstall: Run scripts/setup_openclaw_env.sh, add API keys to ~/.openclaw/workspace/.secrets/last30days.env, then verify with: python3 scripts/last30days.py --diagnose
